---
title: "Projects & Applications"
---

Select an application below to view interactive dashboards, project methodology, and system architectures.

\<div class="project-grid"\>

<a href="docs/project-mangrove.html">

::: {.project-circle style="background-image: url('images/docs/mangrove.jpeg');"}
:::

::: project-title
Automated Mangrove Monitoring
:::

</a>

<a href="docs/project-habitat.html">

::: {.project-circle style="background-image: url('images/docs/habitat.jpg');"}
:::

::: project-title
Habitat Suitability Analytics
:::

</a>

<a href="docs/project-cloud.html">

::: {.project-circle style="background-image: url('images/docs/cloud-compute.jpg');"}
:::

::: project-title
Spatial Decision Support
:::

</a>

\</div\>
